name: businessos-ai
description: BusinessOS AI - WhatsApp Sales Operating System

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
